response.justification: Maria Rodriguez is an experienced full-stack and web developer with 15+ years of broad software experience, but she is fundamentally mismatched with this role on every critical axis. The position mandates native-level Japanese proficiency, which she does not possess — her listed languages are English, Romanian, and basic German. Her C programming exposure is minimal and dated (roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015), whereas the role demands strong, current C expertise for embedded UNIX development. She has no demonstrated experience with any of the required security or networking technologies (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, captive portal, L2/L3 switching, Linux kernel modification), and her entire career trajectory is firmly in web, cloud, and full-stack domains.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience spanning multiple domains and languages demonstrates adaptability
Embedded systems exposure mentioned in profile summary with some hardware development work at Altom Consulting
Strong English proficiency satisfies the documentation reading and email communication requirement
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency whatsoever — a hard, non-negotiable mandatory requirement for this role
C programming experience is minimal (~6 months, dated to 2014–2015); primary stack is TypeScript, Node.js, and web technologies
Zero experience with any required security or networking technologies: no MACsec, 802.1X, switch operation, Linux kernel work, or embedded firmware development

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking or security domain experience
Years of general software engineering experience
